subcodes.first_line: O Nabíl! My Most Exalted Pen maketh mention of thee and enjoineth upon thee that whereby the hearts of all mankind may be attracted. Read thou My verses in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نبیل یذکرک قلمی الاعلی و یامرک بما تنجذب به افئده العالم ان اقرا آیاتی فی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
